CustomField.formula:
IF(OR(CONTAINS( Id_Obtentor__c , "03"),CONTAINS( Id_Obtentor__c , "14"), CONTAINS( Id_Obtentor__c , "85") ), IMAGE("/Obtentores/resource/MarcasSE/GDM.jpg","GDM",100,100), IF(CONTAINS( Id_Obtentor__c , "13"), IMAGE("/Obtentores/resource/MarcasSE/Pioneer.jpg","Pioneer",48,100), IF(CONTAINS( Id_Obtentor__c , "87"), IMAGE("/Obtentores/resource/MarcasSE/Brevant.jpg","Brevant",48,100), IF(OR(CONTAINS( Id_Obtentor__c , "04"),CONTAINS( Id_Obtentor__c , "23") ), IMAGE("/Obtentores/resource/MarcasSE/Syngenta.jpg","Syngenta",61,100), IF(CONTAINS( Id_Obtentor__c , "24"), IMAGE("/Obtentores/resource/MarcasSE/Stine.jpg","Stine",28,100), IF(CONTAINS( Id_Obtentor__c , "26"), IMAGE("/Obtentores/resource/MarcasSE/ACA.jpg","ACA",36,100), IF(CONTAINS( Id_Obtentor__c , "15"), IMAGE("/Obtentores/resource/MarcasSE/MacroSeed.jpg","Macroseed",36,100), IF(CONTAINS( Id_Obtentor__c , "16"), IMAGE("/Obtentores/resource/MarcasSE/MacroSeed.jpg","Macroseed",36,100),
IF(CONTAINS( Id_Obtentor__c , "77"), IMAGE("/Obtentores/resource/MarcasSE/BASF_Credenz.jpg","Credenz",46,193), IF(CONTAINS( Id_Obtentor__c , "19"), IMAGE("/Obtentores/resource/MarcasSE/Bioceres.jpg","Bioceres",80,80), IF(CONTAINS( Id_Obtentor__c , "12"), IMAGE("/resource/1740148165000/MarcaLG.png","LG",36,100), IF(CONTAINS( Id_Obtentor__c , "90"), IMAGE("/resource/1740148165000/Nord.png","Nord",36,100),
IF(CONTAINS( Id_Obtentor__c , "12"), IMAGE("/Obtentores/resource/MarcaLG/Logo LG.png","LG",80,80), IF(CONTAINS( Id_Obtentor__c , "05"), IMAGE("/Obtentores/resource/buck.png","BUCK",80,80), IF(CONTAINS( Id_Obtentor__c , "92"), IMAGE("/Obtentores/resource/Cerfoly.png","Cerfoly",80,80),
"" ) ) ) ) ) ) ) )) ) )))))
CustomField.label: Marcas
